summary: PR 2410 decompiled and typed several routines in src/melee/gm/gmmain_lib, updated matching signatures in the public header, added required includes, and introduced a small static sdata2 byte. Automated report evidence says 4 new matches landed: gmMainLib_8015F260, InitializePersistentNameData, .sdata2, and gmMainLib_8015FA34; four additional gmmain_lib functions improved but remained partial.

key_files.role: Main implementation changes: added includes, decompiled several gmmain_lib routines, used loops/macros for repeated name-tag and stat initialization, added PAD_STACK and inline_depth tactics, and introduced static u8 gmMainLib_804D3EE4.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/gm/gmmain_lib.c added 274 deleted 12 hunks 7
raw_diff: gmmain_lib.c include additions for placeholder.h, textlib.h, mnname.h, tylist.h
raw_diff: bodies added for gmMainLib_8015DBF4, gmMainLib_8015EA80, InitializePersistentNameData, gmMainLib_8015F150, gmMainLib_8015F260, gmMainLib_8015F600
raw_diff: gmMainLib_8015FA34 changed to s32 arg, PAD_STACK(50), pragma inline_depth(3), x186C assignment 0xFF
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report lists matched/improved items

key_files.role: Header signature cleanup for recovered routines, replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS and changing gmMainLib_8015FA34 parameter type.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/gm/gmmain_lib.h added 5 deleted 5 hunks 3
raw_diff: gmMainLib_8015DBF4 s32(s32), gmMainLib_8015EA80 void(void), gmMainLib_8015F150 void(void), gmMainLib_8015F260 void(void), gmMainLib_8015FA34 void(s32)

what_changed.text: Added implementations for formerly stubbed/comment-only gmmain_lib routines: gmMainLib_8015DBF4, gmMainLib_8015EA80, InitializePersistentNameData, gmMainLib_8015F150, gmMainLib_8015F260, and gmMainLib_8015F600.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: replacement of /// #gmMainLib_8015DBF4, /// #gmMainLib_8015EA80, /// #gmMainLib_8015EF84, /// #gmMainLib_8015F150, /// #gmMainLib_8015F260, /// #gmMainLib_8015F600 with function bodies

what_changed.text: Updated gmMainLib_8015FA34 from int to s32 argument, added PAD_STACK(50), wrapped it in pragma push/inline_depth(3)/pop, changed x186C assignment from -1 to 0xFF, and removed an inline-related todo comment.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmMainLib_8015FA34 hunk
raw_diff: gmmain_lib.h gmMainLib_8015FA34 prototype changed from int to s32

what_changed.text: Recovered public header prototypes for several functions by replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS with concrete signatures.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmmain_lib.h prototype changes around 15DBF4, 15EA80, 15F150, 15F260, 15FA34

what_changed.text: Automated report credited new 100% matches for gmMainLib_8015F260, InitializePersistentNameData, .sdata2, and gmMainLib_8015FA34; it also reported improvements for gmMainLib_8015DBF4, gmMainLib_8015F600, gmMainLib_8015EA80, and gmMainLib_8015F150.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report for GALE01 fb8058d - e37dfb7

smart_moves.text: Header prototypes were updated alongside recovered bodies instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS in the exported gmmain_lib interface.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmmain_lib.h prototype updates
decomp_standards: truthful-headers-and-includes

smart_moves.text: Repeated persistent-name and fighter-stat clearing patterns were expressed as loops over typed struct fields rather than copied blocks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: InitializePersistentNameData loops over vs_kos and play_time_by_fighter
raw_diff: gmMainLib_8015F150 loops over FighterData and fighter_kos
raw_diff: gmMainLib_8015F260 loops over 120 NameTagData entries
decomp_standards: natural-loops

smart_moves.text: The repeated name-tag adjustment condition in gmMainLib_8015DBF4 was factored through local macros and a loop for VsModeData player slots.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ADJ_NAMETAG_78 and ADJ_VMD macros in gmMainLib_8015DBF4

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered game-mode function proves its signature, update the owning header in the same PR rather than leaving UNK_RET or UNK_PARAMS.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmmain_lib.c added bodies for functions previously represented by comments
raw_diff: gmmain_lib.h replaced UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS for 15DBF4, 15EA80, 15F150, 15F260

decomp_lessons.lesson: Bulk initialization of repeated stat arrays in gmmain_lib can be represented with ordinary counted loops over recovered fields such as vs_kos, fighter_kos, play_time_by_fighter, and sd_count.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: InitializePersistentNameData zeroes vs_kos[120], play_time_by_fighter[25], initializes sd_count, sets x1A2
raw_diff: gmMainLib_8015F150 zeroes fighter_kos[25] and initializes sd_count
raw_diff: gmMainLib_8015F260 repeats NameTagData initialization over 120 entries
text_corpus: bot report says InitializePersistentNameData and gmMainLib_8015F260 reached 100%

naming_conventions.text: The recovered semantic name InitializePersistentNameData is used for the function at 15EF84 in both source and header.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: /// #gmMainLib_8015EF84 replaced with void InitializePersistentNameData(s32 arg0)
raw_diff: gmmain_lib.h keeps /* 15EF84 */ void InitializePersistentNameData(s32)

naming_conventions.text: Most unrecovered or unclear globals and fields kept address/offset-style names such as gmMainLib_804D3EE4, gmMainLib_804D3EE0, unk_590, x1F2C, x2FF8, and x1A2.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added static u8 gmMainLib_804D3EE4
raw_diff: new bodies retain offset-style field names throughout gmmain_lib.c
decomp_standards: conservative-naming

naming_conventions.text: Short loop and pointer locals such as i, j, k, data, bank, base, src, gr, and val were used where local roles were clear.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: local declarations in gmMainLib_8015DBF4, gmMainLib_8015EA80, InitializePersistentNameData, gmMainLib_8015F260, gmMainLib_8015F600

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK was used in multiple recovered or adjusted routines, including gmMainLib_8015D984, InitializePersistentNameData, gmMainLib_8015F150, gmMainLib_8015F260, and gmMainLib_8015FA34.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR evidence includes bot match/improvement results but no human explanation for each PAD_STACK use.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: gmMainLib_8015FA34 was wrapped with #pragma push, #pragma inline_depth(3), and #pragma pop, apparently to affect inlining/matching for that function.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: pragma push/inline_depth(3)/pop surrounding gmMainLib_8015FA34
text_corpus: bot report says gmMainLib_8015FA34 improved from 98.30% to 100.00%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: No review discussion or author note explains why this pragma was required or whether adjacent functions were checked.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Local macros ADJ_NAMETAG_78 and ADJ_VMD encoded repeated compare/decrement/0x78 sentinel logic and repeated six-player VsModeData traversal.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmMainLib_8015DBF4 macro definitions and calls
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The bot report lists gmMainLib_8015DBF4 as improved to 59.65%, not fully matched.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: do-while loops were used for fixed-count bank and fighter iterations in gmMainLib_8015F600.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmMainLib_8015F600 do while (j < 25) and do while (j < 19)
text_corpus: bot report says gmMainLib_8015F600 improved to 86.01%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The function remained partial per bot report.

notes: The PR body is empty, so author intent is inferred only from changed code and automated report output.
There are no human review comments or reviews in the loaded slice.
The bot report provides match/improvement evidence, but only four items are reported as new 100% matches; several newly implemented functions remained partial.
PAD_STACK and pragma inline_depth tactics are visible, but the slice does not include narrow build commands, objdiff logs beyond the bot report, or adjacent-function regression evidence.
No claim is made that partial functions such as gmMainLib_8015DBF4, gmMainLib_8015EA80, gmMainLib_8015F150, or gmMainLib_8015F600 were fully matched.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Update game-mode headers when bodies prove signatures
accepted_candidate_records.text: In gmmain_lib, recovered function bodies were paired with header prototype cleanup: UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS were replaced for gmMainLib_8015DBF4, gmMainLib_8015EA80, gmMainLib_8015F150, and gmMainLib_8015F260, and gmMainLib_8015FA34 was changed from int to s32.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmmain_lib.c recovered function bodies
raw_diff: gmmain_lib.h prototype changes

accepted_candidate_records.title: gmmain_lib persistent-name initialization matches with typed loops
accepted_candidate_records.text: InitializePersistentNameData and gmMainLib_8015F260 reached 100% in the automated report while using loops over NameTagData fields such as vs_kos, sd_count, play_time_by_fighter, and x1A2.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: InitializePersistentNameData body
raw_diff: gmMainLib_8015F260 body
text_corpus: bot report lists both as 100.00%

source_update_candidates.title: Pragma and PAD_STACK tactics in accepted PRs still need narrow evidence
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2410 visibly used PAD_STACK and inline_depth pragmas and received automated match/improvement results, but the slice lacks human explanation or adjacent-regression proof for each tactic. This supports preserving the existing standard that such tactics require explicit verification, rather than weakening it.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK uses and inline_depth pragma in gmmain_lib.c
text_corpus: bot report match/improvement results
decomp_standards: matching-tactics-need-evidence
decomp_standards: avoid-pragmas-register-asm
source_update_candidates.reason: Route to curator as reinforcement/annotation candidate only; the PR does not provide enough explanation to establish a new standard.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all added functions fully matched; the bot report marks only gmMainLib_8015F260, InitializePersistentNameData, .sdata2, and gmMainLib_8015FA34 as new 100% matches.
Do not promote inline_depth(3), PAD_STACK(50), or other stack/pragma steering as normal style from this PR alone.
Do not infer reviewer approval rationale; the loaded slice has no human reviews or review comments.
Do not treat gmMainLib_804D3EE4 semantics as known beyond being a static u8 used as a terminator in the added namedata copy loop.
